title: Evaluation Datasets, Hard Negatives, Leakage, and Experiment Design · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs evaluation datasets, hard negatives, leakage, and experiment design from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for versioned retrieval and answer test collection after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.
Create relevance and claim-support judgments with rubrics, independent assessors, adjudication, agreement, and provenance.
Include lexical, semantic, stale, conflicting, unauthorized, near-duplicate, adversarial, and counterfactual hard negatives.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate development, validation, test, canary, and incident sets and track document, query, judgment, prompt, model, and result versions. Artifact under review: versioned retrieval and answer test collection.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Rag Eval Leakage Versioning, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Eval Leakage Versioning query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof.

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Eval Leakage Versioning
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Eval Leakage Versioning: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 2386 during a public-benefits policy change. Build deterministic Python evidence to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate development, validation, test, canary, and incident sets and track document, query, judgment, prompt, model, and result versions.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Eval Leakage Versioning.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Eval Leakage Versioning, keep Rag Eval Leakage Versioning connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate development, validation, test, canary, and incident sets and track document, query, judgment, prompt, model, and result versions.
